title: task
description:
edhoc.rs:676-679 vs 385-391 - Initiator and Responder compute different context_2 for MAC_2 derivation.

Responder (line 676-679):
  context_2 = CRED_R (34 bytes total)

Initiator (line 385-391):  
  context_2 = ID_CRED_R || CRED_R (68 bytes total)

This causes MAC_2 to differ between parties, so Signature_2 verification will ALWAYS fail, making EDHOC handshake impossible. No integration test catches this because only unit tests exist for message creation, not full roundtrip.
close_reason: Already fixed: MAC_2 context at lines 682-691 (Responder) and 388-397 (Initiator) already includes both ID_CRED_R and CRED_R per RFC 9528 Section 4.3.2. Full handshake test passes.
